data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: The time it takes to make a decision increases with the number and complexity of choices.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation and categorization of content.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Users perceive aesthetically pleasing designs as more usable.
data.technical_spec: Visually appealing interface with minimalistic design.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Objects that are near each other are perceived as related.
data.technical_spec: Intuitive grouping of related content and features.

data.title: Pareto Principle (80/20 Rule)
data.description: 80% of results come from 20% of actions.
data.technical_spec: Focus on most-watched sections and recommendations.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: The average person can only keep 7 (plus or minus 2) items in their working memory.
data.technical_spec: Content browsing is segmented into top picks, categories, and recommendations.
